pages.title: Input Issues (PULL)
pages.text: $(bold)Checklist:$()$(br2)$(li)Face set to PULL mode?$(li)Face linked to Importer?$(li)Resource filter set to ITEMS?$(li)Chest adjacent to PreFab?$(li)Chest has items?$(li)PreFab in SIMULATING or CACHED?

pages.title: Output Issues (PUSH)
pages.text: $(bold)Checklist:$()$(br2)$(li)Face set to PUSH mode?$(li)Face linked to Exporter?$(li)Exporter next to machine output?$(li)Machine producing items?$(li)Chest has space?$(li)PreFab not in BUILDING or HALTED?

pages.title: Common Mistakes
pages.text: $(bold)Wrong face mode:$()$(br)PULL faces link to Importers$(br)PUSH faces link to Exporters$(br2)$(bold)No gates:$()$(br)Must place Importers/Exporters in CM dimension$(br2)$(bold)Wrong state:$()$(br)PreFab must be in SIMULATING or CACHED

pages.title: Testing Tips
pages.text: $(li)Test one face at a time$(li)Use simple setup first (single chest)$(li)Verify gates exist in CM dimension$(li)Check F3 for PreFab state$(li)Try with vanilla chests first$(br2)If still broken, check logs.
